plexArabicCache.name: Diary of a Country Prosecutor
plexArabicCache.description: Qamar dies after being shot, and the last name he says is that of his wife's sister Reem, who is the only witness. But after her arrest, her beauty draws the attention of the prosecutor, and she succeeds in escaping.

plexArabicCache.name: Difficult Time
plexArabicCache.description: No description available

plexArabicCache.name: Don't leave me alone
plexArabicCache.description: An Egyptian businessman living in Lebanon with his spoiled son Adel and his recy daughter Zizi. Zizi loves the young man Mahmoud, who works with her father, but he loves the new employee Samia, and Adel applys to marry her, so he accepts and marries her, but he lives with her in doubt because he feels that she still loves Mahmoud.

plexArabicCache.name: Dreams of Hind and Camilia
plexArabicCache.description: Hend is a young widow who works as a maid, she meets Eid the conman who goes to prison and leaves her pregnant. While Camellia is a divorced maid who supports her unemployed brother and his family in exchange for letting her sleep over in his apartment.

plexArabicCache.name: Eayida
plexArabicCache.description: Aida is a village girl whose father, Mohammad Effendi, works on the farmland owned by Amin Pasha, who has a son named Sami. When her father is killed, Amin Pasha takes care of Aida, and a love story develops between Aida and Sami.

plexArabicCache.name: Eghraa
plexArabicCache.description: The events revolve around the character of the girl Nemat (Sabah), who aspires to have a prosperous life to compensate for the suffering she has endured. Neamat pretends to be rich to lure the wealthy young man Hussein (Shukri Sarhan) into falling in love with her. Nemat's plan faces many difficulties and challenges as events unfold.

plexArabicCache.name: Eighth Dirty Dozen
plexArabicCache.description: Mayoo preys on people in association with his small gang, but one day he falls victim to his actions and is discovered by someone who assigns his guards to beat him to teach him a lesson. From that painful moment, Mayoo decides to repent, but the gang leader proposes to Bubu to steal his money that is in a safe kept in a hotel room.

plexArabicCache.name: Eimra mutlaqa
plexArabicCache.description: Fathi divorces his wife Zeinab in order to marry his secretary, Salwa. On the other hand, Salwa sympathizes with Zeinab especially when she discovers that she's  pregnant. Then she's surprised that Fathi wants to seize the land she owns.

plexArabicCache.name: El'Ersh
plexArabicCache.description: After a traumatic childhood that saw her kidnapped, assaulted and living with a pimp, Tofaha starts dealing drugs and competes with Abo Srea, while Dr. Nadeem tries to get people to stop taking drugs.

plexArabicCache.name: Elly Ye'ish Yama Yeshuf
plexArabicCache.description: A girl leaves her job because of the harassment of the owner of the store where she works. She meets a young man who offers to help her, but in reality he traps her into engaging in illegal activities and she drifts on the path of loss until her lover comes at the last moment to save her, and she dies in his arms.

plexArabicCache.name: The Empty Pillow
plexArabicCache.description: Salah is a young man living the best days of his life with his first love Samiha. Soon, Salah's dreams deteriorate when Samiha accepts a proposal from a wealthy man, and he eventually tries to overcome and start a new life with another woman.

plexArabicCache.name: The End of the Storm
plexArabicCache.description: No description available

plexArabicCache.name: Enemy of Women
plexArabicCache.description: Nadia manages to make the famous writer Dr. Essa, who is anti-women, to fall in love with her and changes his attitude towards women.

plexArabicCache.name: Enough, my heart
plexArabicCache.description: Despite a big age gap fawziya marries Abdelaziz against her family wishes and has a daughter Feeling confined to home life she seeks help from Wasfi to start a journalism career she rises socially and gradually becomes a high-society lady.

plexArabicCache.name: Esh El-Gharam
plexArabicCache.description: After an incident where they nearly drown, Medhat and Laila are forced to spend a night on an island. As they grow close, Aida learns that Medhat wants to marry Laila and plots with Gohar to separate the two. When their plots fail, Aida tries to seduce Medhat and convince him that Laila loves Gohar.

plexArabicCache.name: Eve's Lies
plexArabicCache.description: Wafaa, married to Kamal after the death of her first husband Nashaat, feels neglected. To spark Kamal's jealousy, she asks Elewa to pretend to be Nashaat and claim he's still alive. Things take a turn when the real Nashaat suddenly appears

plexArabicCache.name: Execution of a Judge
plexArabicCache.description: Ref'at is a judge who is ruling on an important case that witnesses a lot of security interference. Rafiq Al-Henawy has him killed and stages it as a suicide before the ruling. Twenty years later, his daughter returns to take revenge on Rafiq, who has become a businessman.

plexArabicCache.name: Faik we Rayek
plexArabicCache.description: The singer Raik launches his wife, Ashwaq for the third time, and after a period reviewing himself and wants to restore the taste of his passion, but there must be an analyst to come back with his life razor Ahwaq, asks the desires of Fayek to be the analyst, marry Fayq of lusts, but refuses to release them Raik married her, leaving Ahouq home marital Raik presents to his neighbor Soad to represent the role of the wife in front of his father to the absence of lusts, and after a period of longing for her home,

plexArabicCache.name: Farewell at dawn
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmad is an air-force fighter who lives with his rich father who wants him to marry partner's daughter; but he falls in love with Zainab, the poor distant relative, and marries her despite of his father's disapproval. Soon, Ahmad leaves to serve in the Palestine War leaving his wife behind, and he becomes missing in action. She later marries her kind and loving neighbor before finding out that Ahmad wasn't killed in action and that he managed to escape.

plexArabicCache.name: Farewell to Torment
plexArabicCache.description: (Laila) An orphan girl living in a room in a house (Zenobia), living in an apartment in the same house three friends (Nour, Issam, Adel), competing (Issam) and (just) to win her love, while (Nour) (Nour) to marry his rich cousin's daughter and his engagement to (Laila), (Laila) serious illness requires surgery, and can (Zenobia) with (Nur), (Essam) ), And (just) the amount of money necessary for the process that succeeds, and finally the danger to Laila.

plexArabicCache.name: Felfel
plexArabicCache.description: A doctor conducts an experiment on voices, his wife gets involved with their neighbor. When the doctor finds out, he decides to deprive their neighbor, who is a singer, from his beautiful voice and give him the voice the grocer's boy.

plexArabicCache.name: Flame
plexArabicCache.description: No description available

plexArabicCache.name: The Flirtation of Girls
plexArabicCache.description: Replay a play for the movie Spinning Girls, the last of the works of the late genius Naguib Al-Rihani in 1949, which was shared by a championship of stars of that time, including Laila Murad, Anwar Wajdi, Youssef Wahbi and the musician Mohamed Abdel Wahab. His trip in her father's palace.

plexArabicCache.name: For Whom the Sun Rises
plexArabicCache.description: Mamdouh, a young man estranged from his father, starts a poultry farm on his secretary's advice. He meets his secretary's sister Aida, a young woman looking for wealth. When he introduces her to the dancer Nousa, she convinces Aida to become a belly dancer.

plexArabicCache.name: From home to school
plexArabicCache.description: An innocent love story develops between high school student Suheir and lawyer Hassan. Playboy Essam admires Suheir at a party, and when her stepfather kicks her out for being late, she goes to her friend's house, where she finds Essam.

plexArabicCache.name: The Game of Love and Marriage
plexArabicCache.description: The suicidal princess decides to throw herself into the Nile river after she's tired of returning to her divorcee, because she can't resist his temptation, but a taxi driver named Abbas rescues her, so she asks him to work for her so that he could prevent her from returning to her divorced guy.

plexArabicCache.name: El Gentel
plexArabicCache.description: Rashad is a poor man who loves Shhrzad and takes care of her and her sister Souad who loves him. While the three of them are returning to Cairo, they meet a wealthy man dying inside his car after getting shot, and asks them to deliver a suitcase full of money to a woman in the north coast

plexArabicCache.name: The gentle, the gallant, and the greedy
plexArabicCache.description: Wajih heads to Alexandria and lives in one of the apartments there, despite the owner’s objection at first because he is single. Then engineer Anwar, who is going through special circumstances, joins him in the residence.

plexArabicCache.name: Ghadab El Waledain
plexArabicCache.description: A company sorter succeeds in getting a job in the company he works at for his newly graduated son, but the son is constantly ashamed of his father's job. He meets a dancer and marries her despite his father's opposition. A surprise happens that changes all courses.

plexArabicCache.name: Ghaltet Habibi
plexArabicCache.description: Salah and his cousin Souad promise to marry each other. Salah’s uncle asks him to collect revenue from the citadel where he meets Aziza, the flirtatious girl who succeeds in seducing him. Aziza tells him that she's pregnant with his child. Salah becomes torn between his love for Souad, and his attraction for Aziza.

plexArabicCache.name: Gharam Al-Asyad
plexArabicCache.description: Two wealthy brothers (Ahmed and Essam) fall for their stableman's daughter (Noor). When the younger, Essam, tries to assault her, she flees and becomes a famous model, crossing paths with the Ahmed again.

plexArabicCache.name: Gharamiat emaraa
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmed, a medicine student, is loved by his cousin Amina, but he doesn't return her feelings. He falls for the new nurse, Hikmat. After he struggles, she leaves him for Murad, his rich cousin, which sets off a series of unfolding events.

plexArabicCache.name: Gharamyat Magnoon
plexArabicCache.description: Hanafy takes his older friend Youssef to a party at Yasmine's house, where Youssef dies of a heart attack. Hanafy blames Yasmine and forces her to write a confession. She later marries lawyer Medhat and Hanafy blackmails her.

plexArabicCache.name: Ghazeya Min Sonbat
plexArabicCache.description: No description available

plexArabicCache.name: Ghurayb wld eajib
plexArabicCache.description: Actor Gharib becomes a famous rising star,  he marries his cousin Sayida, who's very jealous of him. She recruits many men to track down her husband, especially when he goes to the desert, and meets the Greek girl Verta, and begins to avoid any encounter with his wife.

plexArabicCache.name: Girl of 17
plexArabicCache.description: Law student Safaa (Zubaida Tharwat) loves her colleague Kamal (Ahmed Ramzy), and the two want to get married. However, her father Ibrahim (Hussein Riad) opposes this relationship because Kamal's mother, Horia (Zouzou Madi), runs her house as a gambling ground. He tries hard to sever the ties between them, but the father's efforts go down the drain because the two lovers are attached to each other. The father turns to his friend Dr. Refaat (Mahmoud Zulfikar) asking him to intervene, but Refaat advises the father not to stand in his daughter's way.

plexArabicCache.name: The Girls in Summer
plexArabicCache.description: Three different stories that share the same summer vibes and the beach view.

plexArabicCache.name: Gold
plexArabicCache.description: The events of the film revolve around the child Dahab, who gives birth to Mounir Bey's maid after he secretly married her behind his wife, and after trying to get rid of the newborn child, the poor musician Wahid Alfonso "Anwar Wagdy" finds her and the girl pledges care and love until she grows up and works with him on their many musical tours. As soon as the gates of fame are opened in front of them, fate reveals to Dahab what was hidden from it all these years.

plexArabicCache.name: Gone Girl
plexArabicCache.description: On the occasion of his fifth wedding anniversary, Nick Dunne reports that his wife, Amy, has gone missing. Under pressure from the police and a growing media frenzy, Nick's portrait of a blissful union begins to crumble. Soon his lies, deceits and strange behavior have everyone asking the same dark question: Did Nick Dunne kill his wife?

plexArabicCache.name: Good Morning My Dear Wife
plexArabicCache.description: The work deals with the story of the couple Hassan and Samia, who live happily, and disturbed their lives only some of the harassment of the mother of Samia to Hassan, until the situation changes when they give birth to their child (Hani), to use her mother Samia to care for the young and live with them at home and events escalate.

plexArabicCache.name: Good News
plexArabicCache.description: Sana (Shadyah), daughter of Mukhtar Pasha, is a lovely girl who gets proposed to by Susoo Bey (Abdulsalam El-Nabulsi), a high-class son of one of her father's friends (Sulayman Nagib). Her father welcomes this, but she refuses because she loves Husain (Kamal El-Shinnawi), a young engineer who works in her father's company. Susoo Bey discovers that and agrees with the company director to drive a wedge between them. He uses a dancer to claim to the girl that she is the engineer's wife. Events and surprises continue.

plexArabicCache.name: Goodbye My Friend
plexArabicCache.description: Two friends Marzouk and Barakat, work with street vendor Batta on her cart in the melon trade. Al-Gayiar who works in the trade of stolen cars admires them, they work with him till they become his competitors. He decides to get rid of them after they've become a treat.

plexArabicCache.name: Gouz Meraty
plexArabicCache.description: Due to his recklessness, Ahmed divorces his wife, Laila, for the third time but wants her back. They seek a Muhallil and find Hassan, agreeing to a one-day marriage. Yet, the divorce gets postponed and Laila starts falling for Hassan.

plexArabicCache.name: The Great Adventure
plexArabicCache.description: Yassin is a fame-seeker who makes a deal with the lawyer, Samir, to falsely confess to a famous murder, in the hopes that the media attention will benefit them both, as Samir proves Yassin's innocence at the last moment. But when Yassin is implicated in the crime, Samir has to find the real killer to save him.

plexArabicCache.name: The Greatest Kid in the World
plexArabicCache.description: Fathi is an Egyptian professor at Beirut University and his wife, Samia, is a TV presenter. She is surprised by the arrival of Matilda, the daughter of his Swedish friend, to live with them. Samia is jealous of Matilda's beauty, as Matilda begins to flirt with Fathi and he tries to resist her temptation. Matilda wants him to have a baby with her that will be the greatest child in the world.

plexArabicCache.name: The Green Doorstep
plexArabicCache.description: A naive man Mabrouk arrives from Upper Egypt to Cairo and he meets Youssef, a fraudster. Youssef convinces him that he can sell him the Ataba square. On the other hand, Mona, a young singer seeking fame also falls prey to him.

plexArabicCache.name: Hadith almadina
plexArabicCache.description: The film revolves around a famous football player who meets a flirtatious girl, until his athletic level deteriorates, affecting his future. His teammates and friends cooperate until he leaves the girl and returns to his former self.

plexArabicCache.name: Halim
plexArabicCache.description: A biopic of Egyptian singer Abdel-Haleem Hafez (Zaki).

plexArabicCache.name: Hamido
plexArabicCache.description: Hamido (Farid Shawqi) works as a fisherman at sea, but he also deals in drugs by sea. Hamido and Saadia (Hoda Sultan) live in a great love story, but the teacher Qarsh (Mahmoud El-Meligy) does not leave them alone.

plexArabicCache.name: Hamsat Al-Shaytan
plexArabicCache.description: A wealthy man, Aziz, marries a young wife but when they return to his estate, the wife struggles with her sexually impotent husband. Meanwhile, she notices a handsome young man working in the stable. Will she throw herself unto his arms to escape a wretched marriage?

plexArabicCache.name: Hanan
plexArabicCache.description: (Hassan), the simple contractor, lives a happy life with his wife (Amina) and his daughter (Laila). He succeeds in his work, becomes a wealthy contractor, and meets (Murad) Bey and they start a company. (Nima), (Murad's) playful sister, tries to lure (Hassan) into... She falls into her trap, and succeeds in doing so in order to cover up the suspicious actions of her brother (Murad). Hassan leaves his wife (Amina) and divorces her. His daughter, Laila, and her fiancé, Aziz, try to expose Naama and Murad and reunite the family.

plexArabicCache.name: harbor girl
plexArabicCache.description: In a village near the Burullus Canal, Fatma rescues a drowning fisherman named Hassan. Her fiancé Mahgoub grows jealous and threatens Hassan, seeing him as a rival and relying on his gang to intimidate him.

plexArabicCache.name: Harib min Al-Ayyam
plexArabicCache.description: No one can confront the Al-Dafrawi gang, which is wreaking havoc, and a young man is roaming with a drum in the town, and a girl from the village sympathizes with him, but she does not exchange love, and we discover that this idiot is nothing but the leader of the gang.

plexArabicCache.name: Hassan Beh El Ghalban
plexArabicCache.description: Hassan lands a job with merchant Salem through a friend. When Salem refuses to join Al-Nabrawy's illegal trade, Al-Nabrawy tries to recover incriminating documents that ended up in Salem's possession.

plexArabicCache.name: The Help
plexArabicCache.description: An aspiring author during the civil rights movement of the 1960s decides to write a book detailing the African American maids' point of view on the white families for which they work, and the hardships they go through on a daily basis.

plexArabicCache.name: Hero of Paper
plexArabicCache.description: "Ramy Qashwa" a funny writer discovers that his new movie scenario has been stolen by an insane guy who is performing all the crimes in the scenario , the writer decides to stop that criminal by himself with the help of "Sawsan" the young journalist after the police refuses to believe his story

plexArabicCache.name: A Hero Till the End
plexArabicCache.description: Hafez takes advantage of his presidency of the Childhood Protection Association and his knowledge of the rich families, to cover up his criminal activity in which he kidnaps the children of these families in exchange for ransom.

plexArabicCache.name: His Excellency, The Ambassador
plexArabicCache.description: Khaled, an ambassador, leaves for two weeks. His servant Fouad impersonates him, and employee Huda poses as his wife. Foreign ambassadors mistake Fouad for Khaled and hold important talks with him.

plexArabicCache.name: His Highness Hanafy
plexArabicCache.description: The film's story revolves around Hanafi Al-Abha, who holds up a jewelry store with his three partners Khairi, Rashad, and Badwi, and takes possession of the stolen bag and hides it with his brother Ahmed before he arrests his three partners. They escape and kidnap Ahmed's wife until they retrieve the bag.

plexArabicCache.name: Hob La Yara Al-Shams
plexArabicCache.description: Story is about a beautiful decent young girl who is struggling to help her family. She gets an offer from a rich man who is eager to have an heir to his wealth. He asks her to become a surrogate to his own son. His son has been married for few years without an heir. Regretfully, she agreed. The childless couple agreed for the husband to spend time with her until she gets pregnant. But things don't go as planned.

plexArabicCache.name: The Honored Family
plexArabicCache.description: Sett Abuha is a young lady who lives in a local neighborhood and marries Salah. Growing dissatisfied with her lot in life, she leaves for Istanbul where she meets a wealthy man who turns her into a fine lady. Can she run away from her husband?

plexArabicCache.name: House of Forbidden Pleasures
plexArabicCache.description: Escaping the cruelty of the streets, Na'ima turns to a lady who runs a den for vice and gambling. Na'ima becomes a totally different person as she invents a new identity for herself, but when she meets Hasanin, other considerations have to be taken into account.

plexArabicCache.name: A house without love
plexArabicCache.description: Mother Fatima controls her children. Her eldest son Essam challenges her and urges his brothers to stand up to her. Essam falls for his neighbor, Suhair, who is already married to Usta Rajab. She shares the same feelings, and they agree to marry after she gets divorced.

plexArabicCache.name: A Husband By Rent
plexArabicCache.description: Murad is facing financial hardship, and he has no solution but to travel to his uncle to borrow some money, but there are many responsibilities that prevent him from traveling until his secretary (Hasan) finds a very similar person named Pepper. He (Hasan) agrees to replace him While traveling with money, and the events follow.

plexArabicCache.name: A Husband’s Confession
plexArabicCache.description: This comedy revolves around Wahid (Fouad el Mohandes), a happily married composer/lyricist who has a one-off dream about kissing the gorgeous singer/neighbor (Hind Rostom) he collaborates with. He feels guilty, and foolishly confesses this to his naturally suspicious wife Latifa (Shoueikar) who instantly concludes they are having an affair. This is worsened tenfold when Latifa lets her parents (Mary Mounib and Youssef Wahby) in on the situation.

plexArabicCache.name: I Am Not Myself
plexArabicCache.description: Farid is enjoying his honeymoon with his new wife in one of the luxurious hotels in Marrakesh, only to be surprised by the arrival of his ex-wives, which will threaten all his plans to escape from them with failure.

plexArabicCache.name: I Have the Wallet
plexArabicCache.description: After failing in his studies, Atoua turns to pickpocket. He meets his classmate Shukri, who is now the manager of a food company, he promises to find him a job but Atoua feels that he's lying. He steals his wallet and finds documents implicating Shukri and other people in embezzlement cases.

plexArabicCache.name: I'm The Doctor
plexArabicCache.description: Nurse Ibrahim is a medical practitioner, although he does not have the qualification to perform this profession.He owns a clinic in his village.When he starts working he falls in love with the orphan girl Nadia.Abraham works to raise the most money by thinking that the healthy villagers are sick. However, he regrets his cheating on the people and extortion, and Nadia exchanges her feelings with time.

plexArabicCache.name: Idol of the Masses
plexArabicCache.description: Ibrahim Farid is an amateur actor who is deeply in love with Sohair the famous stage actress. He knows he cannot marry Sohair due to her higher status in society, until one day he gets an important part in a play where he can declare his love to her. Ibrahim is overwhelmed with happiness for being able express his true feelings to Sohair who later shows those same feelings to him.

plexArabicCache.name: If I Was Rich
plexArabicCache.description: Film revolves around a poor barber named Mahroos (Besharah Wakim) who dreams of getting rich all the time. This dream comes true one day when his beggar relative dies, and he finds a lot of money in his house, which leads to change in the situation of the entire Mahroos family, and they move to live in Al-Zamalek, but the family members do not realize what awaits them as result of their reckless actions.

plexArabicCache.name: Immortal Song
plexArabicCache.description: A beautiful young girl is secretly in love with a long time friend of the family, who is also a very famous singer. One day she was shocked when he married her cousin. She kept her love secret and reluctantly wished them all the best. But their marriage had some flaws.

plexArabicCache.name: The Important Thing Is Love
plexArabicCache.description: Shahinaz is a young rich girl, she is suddenly struck with a sickness that forces her to leave parties and drinking and the doctor who is treating her advices her not to have wild life or she will die, when the doctor has to travel abroad he asks his assistant nurse Fahmi to take care of this patient, Shahinaz falls in love with Fahmi without knowing that he is in love with another girl.

plexArabicCache.name: The Impostor
plexArabicCache.description: Brothers look alike. The first, a crook, asks his honest but poor brother to take his place after being chased by enemies. The crook works in diamond smuggling and tricks his into a mental hospital but later frees him to deceive gangsters.

plexArabicCache.name: The Informer
plexArabicCache.description: Ashraf is a wealthy man who falls in love with Nevine, but she walks away from him because of the social difference. Ashraf loses his wealth and Nevine returns to him again, they plan to get married but Nevine gets involved with a gang that wants to get the secret of an invention while she's looking for work.

plexArabicCache.name: Inni rahela
plexArabicCache.description: The film revolves around Aida (Madiha Yousry) who loves her cousin, the officer Ahmed (Emad Hamdy), and he reciprocates the same feelings. Her father (Serag Mounir) refuses to let her marry him and threatens to destroy his future. He marries her against her will to the son of the Prime Minister so that he can benefit from his father's influence. Ahmed's hope of marrying Aida is lost, so he marries another woman, but she soon dies while Aida discovers her husband's betrayal.

plexArabicCache.name: Kandil om Hashem
plexArabicCache.description: Ismail, a medical student, goes to East Germany. He meets a girl there. Back in Egypt, his family struggles financially. After returning as an oculist, he finds patients using oil from an old mosque lamp that worsens their condition.

plexArabicCache.name: Katkout
plexArabicCache.description: While escaping being forced to present himself for sacrifice to redeem his family, Katkout is discovered by a National Security Agency who find he bears a strong resemblance to Yousef Khoury, the international terrorist. He is then persuaded him to enter a training mission that will allow him to impersonate Yousef Khoury.

plexArabicCache.name: A Killer Who killed No one
plexArabicCache.description: Adel Gahrib is a widowed insurance sales man living alone with his young daughter Nuha, whom he dotes on. He falls in love with his new neighbor Safaa, and proposes to marry her. Just when things are beginning to look up, he receives some terrible news. Desperate for a way to ensure that Nuha's future is provided for, Adel enters into a deal with another woman that seals his fate.

plexArabicCache.name: A kind of woman
plexArabicCache.description: No description available

plexArabicCache.name: The King of Petrol
plexArabicCache.description: The film follows a veterinarian who moves to the countryside to work and settle down. He proposes to the daughter of a wealthy villager, and her father agrees-on one condition: the doctor must give up his land, believing it contains oil.

plexArabicCache.name: Ladies Barber
plexArabicCache.description: The film revolves around three friends, one of whom decides to develop his father's shop for shaving. It is divided into three sections: one for men, the other for women and the third for animals. The first customer is a maid and her mistress is married. After that, he married a rich master to avenge her ex-husband.

plexArabicCache.name: Lady Sukkar
plexArabicCache.description: Two men try to woo their neighbors that they fell in love with in a party by using their friend preparing for a female role to pretend to be their rich widowed aunt coming to visit, to use the visit as an excuse to invite them over.

plexArabicCache.name: Lahzat daef
plexArabicCache.description: Abdel Ghaffar revolts against his wife, Sania, when he discovers that Sahar is not his daughter, but rather the result of a sinful relationship between Sania before her marriage. Sania dies, and Abdel Ghaffar mistreats Sahar, who travels to Greece to live with her aunt. There, she meets Sharif, who proposes marriage to her, so she confesses to him her true identity.

plexArabicCache.name: Lailet El Henna
plexArabicCache.description: A simple girl is seduced by a wealthy young man who leaves her pregnant. She works as a singer but her son dies, then the young man regrets what he did and marries her after many conflicts with the owner of the nightclub.

plexArabicCache.name: Lak Yom Ya Zalem
plexArabicCache.description: A greedy man betrays his friend and falls in love with his wife, who is a rich lady. He kills him and marries the widow. He steals her money and jewelry and mistreats her. He is then arrested by the police and receives his punishment.

plexArabicCache.name: The Last Night
plexArabicCache.description: Faten Hamama plays a wife who wakes up one morning to discover she is married to her brother-in-law in this suspenseful drama. The confused woman soon learns that fifteen years have gone by and that she was injured in a bomb blast that killed her sister. A local doctor tries to prevent the woman's husband from killing her for the inheritance.

plexArabicCache.name: The Laughing Crime
plexArabicCache.description: "El Gareema el Daheka" (The Funny Crime) is an adaptation of the play/film "The Gazebo". TV producer Medhat (Ahmed Mazhar) learns he is the target of a dangerous man, who's out to kill him to settle an old family feud. To add to the stress, he has just wed and his new bride (Soad Hosny) is unaware of Medhat's current predicament.

plexArabicCache.name: The Law, Excuse Us
plexArabicCache.description: Ali and Hoda are a couple who love each other, but Ali has an issue that makes him unable to engage with the opposite sex. Hoda takes him to specialists who manage to treat him, only for Ali to cheat on her.

plexArabicCache.name: Lawless
plexArabicCache.description: In 1931, the Bondurant brothers of Franklin County, Virginia, run a multipurpose backwoods establishment that hides their true business — bootlegging. Middle brother Forrest is the brain of the operation; older Howard is the brawn, and younger Jack, the lookout. Though the local police have taken bribes and left the brothers alone, a violent war erupts when a sadistic lawman from Chicago arrives and tries to shut down the Bondurants operation.

plexArabicCache.name: The Leech
plexArabicCache.description: A young man from the country arrives in Cairo to finish his education. His landlady, a widow and successful businesswoman in the quarter of the Citadel, seduces him. Although she teaches him much about life she also makes him forget his obligations to his family, his studies, even his religion. When he tries to put her aside she attempts to force him to give up everything in which he believes.

plexArabicCache.name: LEGO Frozen Northern Lights
plexArabicCache.description: Elsa, Anna and friends search for the Northern Lights.

plexArabicCache.name: Leila, Daughter of the Poor
plexArabicCache.description: Laila, from Sayeda Zeinab neighborhood, is introduced at a party as the daughter of Darwish Pasha. She becomes enchanted by the upper-class life, and officer Wahid falls for her. When he proposes, he discovers her true identity.

plexArabicCache.name: El Lemby
plexArabicCache.description: El-Limby lives in a decrepit neighborhood with his mother Faransa and he develops feelings for his neighbor. However, her father objects to their marriage, and El-Limby's mother encourages him to find a job to provide for his family-to-be.

plexArabicCache.name: Let's Dance
plexArabicCache.description: An Egyptian remake of "shall We Dance", told in reverse. A middle-aged lawyer (yousra) is bored from her routine, & is attracted to join a dancing school tutored by a handsome young man (Tamer Hagras), which becomes later a big shock to her husband (Ezat Abu Ouf).

plexArabicCache.name: Lial
plexArabicCache.description: Naimah flees the house in which she lives with her stepfather, and meets a laundryman who intercedes on her behalf with Shahrazad, the building owner, so that she can work for her in her club. Shahrazad is impressed and decides to give her the artistic name Layal. She becomes a famous dancer, and falls in love with journalist Galal and aspires to marry him. All of Shahrazad's wealth goes Layal. Galal marries her out of greed for her new wealth.

plexArabicCache.name: Life is Love
plexArabicCache.description: Layla is a volunteer nurse at the red crescent helping the injured in Palestinian war. She falls in love with officer Adel , and during a raid he gets seriously injured and decides to disappear from her life. She gets married to her colleague and later discovers that Adel is in need of a critical surgery.

plexArabicCache.name: The Life of a Modern Woman
plexArabicCache.description: Dr. Hala is offered a lucrative deal to rent out her clinic, and she agrees. She begins enjoying her new life of financial comfort, until boredom and emptiness slowly creep back into her world.

plexArabicCache.name: The Life of Darkness
plexArabicCache.description: A middle-class family. The son gets a law degree and wants his son to be a lawyer, but the son wants to be a novelist. The son is surrounded by bad friends, so he is led by them into a life of debauchery and slips into the abyss, betrays trust, misappropriates his father's money, and steals his mother's jewelry to satisfy his mistress's demands, which leads to his mother's death.

plexArabicCache.name: The Little Charmer
plexArabicCache.description: Haniyeh has not seen her father since childhood and therefore does not know how it looks and forced her father's friend Esmat Al-Darmali to lie to her and tell her that he is her father Esmat Al-Damanhouri instead of her real father, and therefore Haniyeh continues to treat Esmat Al-Darmali as his father.

plexArabicCache.name: The Lost Love
plexArabicCache.description: Laila and Samia are two best friends ,but things are about to change when Laila moves in with Samia and her husband after the tragic death of Laila's husband.

plexArabicCache.name: Love Among the Elders
plexArabicCache.description: Mokhtar, a learned man who initially rejected women, fell in love with Ahlam, who was living with him to escape her father. Despite his blindness and cruelty, he sacrificed his love for her, allowing her to marry his friend Rauf.

plexArabicCache.name: Love in Karnak
plexArabicCache.description: As Amina tries to join a performing dance troupe, the other members try to figure a solution for their financial situation. Amina falls for Salah, the troupe's director and first dancer, but Salah tries to keep his distance because he thinks she is in love with another.

plexArabicCache.name: The Love Street
plexArabicCache.description: A poor graduated singer struggling to get his chance, disguises into an old music teacher to work in a girl's school. A bet is launched between two of the leading students to trap this teacher into their affection.

plexArabicCache.name: The Lovely Bus Conductors
plexArabicCache.description: A group of unemployed girls who are searching for any chance of employment, apply to the public transportation organization to work as bus conductors. But they find that the job is monopolized and controlled by men, and they start a life-changing experience.

plexArabicCache.name: The Lover
plexArabicCache.description: Jawdat learns about the relationship between his sister Samia and Hussein. Jawdat succeeds in driving a wedge between them, so Hussein leaves Luxor and travels to Cairo, where he begins looking for work. He finally finds work as a musician in a nightclub. Samia discovers her brother Jawdat’s plan, which ruined her relationship with Hussein. She travels to Cairo to look for Hussein.

plexArabicCache.name: Lovers of the Night
plexArabicCache.description: After his wife cheats on him with his friend, a husband seeks solace in a nightclub where a dancer and an alcoholic friend try to console him. When the alcoholic friend kills his wife for money, he leaves his daughter under the care of the husband and the dancer.

plexArabicCache.name: Lovers Village
plexArabicCache.description: In a village, a love story blossoms between Fatma and Abdel Karim. But before marrying her, he falls into the trap of Shahira, a city girl, and they sleep together. Out of guilt, he decides to marry Shahira and abandon Fatma.

plexArabicCache.name: Luck oh World
plexArabicCache.description: Abu Zayd and his colleagues are revolting against the teacher Shamrock which is under the leadership of Shushu, which violates the law. They are working in a new agency, which makes Shosho angry while he is just released from prison.

plexArabicCache.name: Maa Al Ayam
plexArabicCache.description: Afaf is a young widow who is dedicated to her work and her two young children. But when she meets the engineer Adel, her feelings for him leave her struggling between her children and her love for him.

plexArabicCache.name: El Maganeen Fi Naeem
plexArabicCache.description: After spending ten years in a psychiatric hospital, Kandil struggles to find work as people fear him. He finally decides to open an office specializing in solving problems.

plexArabicCache.name: Makansh Aal Baal
plexArabicCache.description: Kamal the painter is related to Yvonne, a classmate in France, but in Egypt he meets Samira, who works as an itinerant artist with her uncle and cousin. Kamal is able to find her a job in one of the theaters, and the grandfather learns of what Kamal has done, so he decides to marry him to Sitaita, but things change when his father returns. Samir after everyone thought he was dead.

plexArabicCache.name: Mama's Secretary
plexArabicCache.description: Amal is a little child who lost her father goes to a circus and finds a man called shalaby who looks exactly like her father. she starts to call him dad and things escalated quickly.

plexArabicCache.name: A Man in My Life
plexArabicCache.description: As Hamdy fights with a fisherman and kills him in front of his daughter, he goes to prison as the fisherman's daughter goes blind. After his release, he tries to atone for his sin by approaching her. They fall in love and get married, but when he finds out that she can regain her sight, he panics.

plexArabicCache.name: A Man in Our House
plexArabicCache.description: Based in British occupied Egypt, Ibrahim (Omar Sharif), a member of the resistance, seeks refuge in the house of a politically passive family after killing the prime minister for his acts of treason.

plexArabicCache.name: The Man of My Dreams
plexArabicCache.description: A young poor inventor impersonates a famous wealthy role in order to win his wealthy girl's love and her father's approval for his discovery.

plexArabicCache.name: A Marriage in Danger
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmed (Ahmed Ramzy) is a hard-working young man in love with Samira (Nadia Lotfy), a girl from a wealthy family. Both want to get married, but Samira's aunt rejects, given Ahmed's social status. Meanwhile, a belly dancer in love with Ahmed is trying to keep them apart.

plexArabicCache.name: Marriage on the Modern Way
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmed and Mona are cousins grew up together to the college. While a vacation on the beach, love takes place between them and decide to get married but it's not that easy.

plexArabicCache.name: Masoom
plexArabicCache.description: A happy family goes through turbulent times because of a big mistake by one of the family members.

plexArabicCache.name: Mawa'ed Ma' Almady
plexArabicCache.description: Hamdi (Salah Zulfikar), the son of a factory owner, falls in love with Fatima (Mariam Fakhr El-Din), the daughter of one of the factory workers. Hamdi begins teaching her to read and write and they become involved in a love affair. He prepares to marry her but is surprised by his father's desire to marry him to Tahia (Sohair El-Babli), the daughter of a competing factory owner. Hamdi refuses to fulfill this desire, so his father expels him. Fatima decides to run away so as not to stand in the way of Hamdi's happiness and future.

plexArabicCache.name: El Mazag
plexArabicCache.description: Gamila is sentenced to one year in prison for manslaughter. Inside the prison, she meets a group of dangerous women and their leader Arwah who turned the prison into a drug den . She tries to controlol Gamila but she fights back.

plexArabicCache.name: El Meaalema Samah
plexArabicCache.description: Boss Kamal controls the market by bribery, but he loves Samah, daughter of the boss who took care of him. Kamal steals from him and burns his stores, which leads to his death. At the same time, Samah refuses to marry Kamal, especially as she waits for the return of Sayyed who returns to disavow her, and seeks to marry the rich daughter of Kamal. Thus Samah decides to take revenge alone on everyone.

plexArabicCache.name: A Meeting with the Past
plexArabicCache.description: Hussein, a money counterfeiter, escapes from the police and his partner in crime Mahmoud gets arrested. Hussein marries Sahar and works for her father, while hiding his past, until "Mahmoud" is released from prison and starts chasing him.

plexArabicCache.name: Melody of My Love
plexArabicCache.description: Ali, a talented singer, falls for the daughter of a retired musician. When her family's situation worsens, she works at a nightclub owned by her mother's lover. To protect her mother's reputation, she pretends to be involved with the owner

plexArabicCache.name: Men who are not afraid of death
plexArabicCache.description: A gang manages to steal jewelry from a bank and flees to the desert. There, a clash occurs between the gang members Shawky, Sameer, and Joe and the bandits in the desert. Rais Hamed lives with his colleague Khamis and the young man Yasser. While Yasser is training with Ustaz Hamed, Yasser is injured and is taken with Ustaz Hamed to the hospital. Nadia, the nurse, goes with them on the way. They meet a gang of bandits. Hamed asks Nadia to call the police.

plexArabicCache.name: The Merry Widow
plexArabicCache.description: Abdel Aal forces his daughter Samira to marry the wealthy and old Kazem. After his death, she inherits his wealth under the condition of never remarrying. Fleeing his family, she falls for Magdy while posing as a maid.

plexArabicCache.name: Mesk and Anbar
plexArabicCache.description: Musk and his friend are two young men who love two of their cousins. Musk disguises himself as a woman to convince the uncle of the girl he loves and the girl's father that the aunt has returned from abroad. The uncle falls in love with the woman and covets her wealth. He agrees for the two girls to marry Musk and Amber. Amber's uncle comes to compete with the uncle, and the American aunt herself comes from the United States.

plexArabicCache.name: The Millionaire
plexArabicCache.description: As a group of youth seek an easy and fast way to get rich. A widowed millionaire just arrived to town. One of them pretends to be a prince to seduce her, But as she falls for him, he experiences a crisis of conscience.

plexArabicCache.name: Millionaire
plexArabicCache.description: A Chilean farmer wins the national lottery but discovers his ticket is destroyed. He sets out with family and friends on a quest to claim his prize.

plexArabicCache.name: Miramar
plexArabicCache.description: Zuhra has nothing to do but to runaway after her family forced her to marry an old rich man. She goes to Alexandria where she works in a motel and there she meets people with different ideologies and thoughts about life.

plexArabicCache.name: Missing Person
plexArabicCache.description: Attia (Yehia al-Fakharani) works as a simple employee, after his mother-in-law threatens to break his engagement from her daughter because of his delay in getting an apartment. He travels to his hometown to sell his inheritance. There he falls in love with Kharyia (Leila Alawi) daughter of Kamal Bey (Farid Shawki) who bought his land.

plexArabicCache.name: Mission In Tel Aviv
plexArabicCache.description: Amal is a spy for israel resident in paris,decides to quit but found herself asked for being double agent for egypt and sent to tel aviv to get a tape of weaponry and strategies against her country in case of war.Missions,danger and torture crossed her path but will she succeed?

plexArabicCache.name: Mokalmet Baa'd Montasaf Elleil
plexArabicCache.description: Dr. Emad marries Nahed, but soon begins receiving threatening anonymous phone calls at midnight, along with strange and frightening events at their home. The police don't take him seriously so he continues investigating on his own.

plexArabicCache.name: Money and Women
plexArabicCache.description: Shehata is a committed employee in a private hospital. He lives with his daughter Nemat and his wife. One day Hussein proposes to his daughter, but the problem is that Shehata is unable to prepare his daughter, which prompts him to ask for an advance from the company. After management refuses, one of the bribed employees takes advantage of the opportunity and offers Shehata received a sum of money in exchange for a trust receipt, which he quickly used against him, especially after Shehata discovered that an incident of embezzlement had occurred.

plexArabicCache.name: Money slaves
plexArabicCache.description: Wahid and Mansour are friends, working in a drug trafficking gang, but Mansour is charged with murder and is sentenced to imprisonment. Before going to jail, he asks Wahid to watch over his wife, and he leaves his money with him. But Wahid betrays his trust, he spends his money and cheats with his wife.

plexArabicCache.name: Monica, O My Darling
plexArabicCache.description: A young engineer who specializes in robotics gets a well paying job and has an affair with female colleague. Some happy moments follow but soon his world goes topsy turvy as he finds himself getting blackmailed and is unwittingly involved in a series of murders. How long will this state of affairs continue and will he come out unscathed ?

plexArabicCache.name: Monsters Run
plexArabicCache.description: The story about 3 people : a doctor who tries to treat his rich patient who is infertile by trasnplant ( illegally , to prove his experiments ) part of a brain from a third person who sell it for money to improve his miserable life .

plexArabicCache.name: Mosmar Juha
plexArabicCache.description: During the Turkish occupation of the city of Kufa, there was an imam in the city called Juha, who called on the people to be guided and to always follow the straight path. Therefore, his method was to address the people, explaining the disadvantages of this occupation. Therefore, the Turkish ruler saw that Juha had become one of the rioters against them, so he ordered his dismissal from his work as an imam. Rather, he goes so far as to arrest and imprison him, and after a while orders his release, but he still continues his struggle against injustice and oppression.

plexArabicCache.name: Mouths and Rabbits
plexArabicCache.description: A story discussing the society problem during the seventies due to not having any family planning, also covering main issue of differences between poor society and rich society. This film introduces a family with 10 kids and lots of problems they get into through a funny story between an Aunt for the kids and her struggle for getting married to the man she loved because of her bother in law who got her married with someone behind her back, using false information.

plexArabicCache.name: Mr. Bahbah
plexArabicCache.description: The film revolves around two partners in the cattle trade who travel to Cairo to live heedless life in nightclubs and got to know a girl who worked at the clubhouse. The girl was then married to one of the two men.

plexArabicCache.name: Mr. Romantic
plexArabicCache.description: Roshdy is a carefree young man who spends his time at nightclubs with women. When his uncle dies, Roshdy is to receive all his fortune but on one condition: he should marry a good and committed woman.

plexArabicCache.name: The Much-Loved One
plexArabicCache.description: Nabila is a singer whose brother constantly takes her money for gambling. When his debts accumulate, he tries to make her marry the theater owner to avoid going to jail, till she meets Raouf and theyey fall in love but face many difficulties.

plexArabicCache.name: Mute Contact
plexArabicCache.description: Nasser, a 15 year old mute youth, lives with his parents and only sister. Because of his disability, his family fails to satisfy his needs and his fellows don't show him any kindness. However, he gets involved in some mental stress which causes him keep away from people and becomes isolated. His teacher realizes the problem and tries with the help of Nasser's family to awaken his hopes of life and make to understand the point that he is the one who is the one who is in need and therefore he must appeal to the hearing society. The family after recognizing their wrong course of actions try to correct their manners towards the boy and establish better relations. Nasser also, after forgetting about his internal controversies of attitude becomes aware of his own weaknesses and tries to develop a more solid and sturdy self dependence. By using his other abilities, exercising continually, and making every endeavour to talk, he gets rid of his mental crisis. Finally he succeeds getting out of seclusion. Alireza Rezaeyan (Nasser) who is indeed a mute boy has now been able to overcome his handicap and now is able to perform his key role so well that in addition to his true life surroundings he transmits this mute-contact to the spectators of the film regardless whether these spectators can hear or not, but the main point is that "no man should ever give up hope of life."

plexArabicCache.name: My Beautiful Teacher
plexArabicCache.description: Nadia moves to a secondary school for boys to teach in Cairo. But the students are not letting her do her job, until an incident happens.

plexArabicCache.name: My blood, My Tears and My Smile
plexArabicCache.description: Regarded as one of the boldest films of the "liberal" 1970s, this award-winning classic is directed by the great Hussein Kamal and written by the controversial Ihsan Abdel Quoddous and featuring a superb cast. A color saturated melodrama and a profound analysis of seventies society and decadence.

plexArabicCache.name: My Father Is on the Tree
plexArabicCache.description: A young man is shunned by his friends after he starts an affair with a dancer.

plexArabicCache.name: My Husband’s Woman
plexArabicCache.description: When her friend Nany convinces her that she is sick, Samya goes in for a checkup and discovers that she is about to die. Samya decides to pick a bride for her husband to marry after she dies.

plexArabicCache.name: My Mother in Law is an Atomic Bomb
plexArabicCache.description: The film revolves around a happy couple, but the wife's mother works to spoil the relationship between the couple, and indeed succeeded in spoiling the relationship and they divorce despite the love for each other.

plexArabicCache.name: My Mother's Fiancé
plexArabicCache.description: Mona confesses to her friend Mushira that she slept with a young man who abandoned her. She gives Mushira one of the letters she wrote to him, and the letter accidentally ends up with Farhat and Tal'at, who think that the letter is Mushira's and try to help her for fear that she might kill herself.

plexArabicCache.name: My One And Only Love
plexArabicCache.description: A gifted but poor musician falls in love with a wealthy young woman. Their romance faces strong opposition from her family due to class differences, leading to separation and emotional turmoil. Through music and perseverance, love ultimately overcomes social barriers.

plexArabicCache.name: My Sleeping Lover
plexArabicCache.description: In an accident of fate, Ramez finds his dream girl in Nesma, but not exactly the one everyone sees. Will that stay for long? is this possible?

plexArabicCache.name: My Wife the General Manager
plexArabicCache.description: Hussein Omar, head of the Projects Department at a construction company, finds himself embroiled in various awkward situations at work when his wife, Esmat Fahmi, is appointed General Manager there.

plexArabicCache.name: My Wife's Dignity
plexArabicCache.description: Mahmoud spends all his time chasing women. As he tries to approach his colleague, she rejects him until he asks her to marry him, but she stipulates that if he cheats, she will do the same. After they get married, she discovers his betrayal and starts to make him think that she's cheating on him.

plexArabicCache.name: Nafeza A'la Al-Ganna
plexArabicCache.description: A young woman from a rich family falls in love with a man who takes advantage of her earnestness and steals her father's fortune.

plexArabicCache.name: Naharak saeed
plexArabicCache.description: The wealthy young man dreams to be a musician but his father refused and kicked him out of the house. He decided to go incognito and join a competition in his father's company to get the money for the theater.

plexArabicCache.name: El Nashal
plexArabicCache.description: Kamal is a thief who finds a broken watch among his stolen items so he puts it aside. It turns out that the watch contains hypersensitive microfilm about military sites, and he becomes followed by the police and the spies who want the watch.

plexArabicCache.name: Nems Bond
plexArabicCache.description: Sherif Bond (Hany Ramzy) is a policeman who is assigned a murder investigation case. When he meets the beautiful brunette, Nour (Dolly Shahin) the widow of the deceased, and despite his little experience in cases like this one, he gets exceptionally motivated to solve the case.

plexArabicCache.name: The night is ours
plexArabicCache.description: Nawal is a singer in a touring band. She admires Dr. Midhat, and tries to gain his admiration, but she is afraid of rejection due to the nature of her work. She is forced to pretend to him that she is a teacher, but with time he discovers her true profession, which pushes him more to cling to her and marry her. Their relationship is put to a real test when a friend of hers is accused of a murder of which he is innocent.

plexArabicCache.name: The Night Of Fatima's Arrest
plexArabicCache.description: Galal sends men from the mental hospital to Port Said to arrest his sister Fatma, using his political position, accusing her of insanity. Fatma escapes to the roof of the house and threatens to throw herself if someone approaches her, telling her story to the crowds around her.

plexArabicCache.name: A Night of Love
plexArabicCache.description: Laila is an abandoned girl who was raised in an orphanage. She works as a nurse, but her colleagues plot to expel her from the hospital. She meets a wealthy young man who wants to marry her, but his father refuses after he learns her secret. She tries to find her real parents.

plexArabicCache.name: Night’s Doors
plexArabicCache.description: Salama falls into the clutches of a criminal faking securities, his financial condition is difficult. It's a great fortune. He withdraws from the life of his cousin who loves him, he cannot face her, she represents his honorable past.

plexArabicCache.name: The Nightingale's Prayer
plexArabicCache.description: This compelling tale of love and betrayal, set in the upper Egyptian countryside, follows the story of Amna as she plots her revenge on the engineer who destroyed her family's honor.

plexArabicCache.name: Nights of Love
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmed Mumtaz is an employee who invents a kind of fabric that does not burn. When he shows it to his boss, the latter shows it to his boss and takes credit for it. Ahmed goes to meet the general manager, and falls for his daughter who thinks that he's a millionaire.

plexArabicCache.name: No Consolation For Women
plexArabicCache.description: Rawyah and her husband Hamdi separate so she moves in with her father along with their daughter, while Hamdi remarries. Rawyah finds work as a secretary at a newspaper where she and Tareq, the editor-in-chief, develop a mutual attraction.

plexArabicCache.name: No Time for Love
plexArabicCache.description: Hamza "a member of the volunteer National Guard" meets up with the teacher Fawzya "Faten", after the fire of Cairo broke out, the British trying to capture all the volunteers in the National Guard , Hamza hiding in the house of one of his friend, and Fawzya help him, and she is trying to formation its own cell in order to hit the English forces in the Canal zone.

plexArabicCache.name: No Understanding
plexArabicCache.description: Mr. Shehata is a family man who lives in Port Said with his tyrannical wife and their children. He spends most of the time at a coffee shop. The two parents pay no heed to their children's choices in life. What will become of them?

plexArabicCache.name: A Nose and Three Eyes
plexArabicCache.description: Dr. Hashem, a well-known plastic surgeon in his mid-forties, has been unable to commit to a romantic relationship for quite some time. Over the years, he has grown very close to two girls but finds enough reasons to avoid them. However, he is now unable to resist a third girl, Ruba, who is twenty-five years younger than him.

plexArabicCache.name: The Nun
plexArabicCache.description: A priest with a haunted past and a novice on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate the death of a young nun in Romania and confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

plexArabicCache.name: One Woman Is Not Enough
plexArabicCache.description: A journalist's affairs with 3 different women,a rich journalist,a rebelious college student and a poor girl and a victim of homelessness After her building collapse,his trouble making and equal love for each of them.

plexArabicCache.name: The Open Door
plexArabicCache.description: Elbab Elmaftouh, Known in English as "The Open Door", another great movie about women's right in their different role and life and thier struggle between her father with his old style and her husband that doesn't understand her.

plexArabicCache.name: Orphans' money
plexArabicCache.description: A family's breadwinner dies, leaving behind his wife and university-aged daughter under the guardianship of his son from a previous marriage. He squanders their money on his own pleasures. A kind family eventually steps in to support them.

plexArabicCache.name: Palm of the Hand
plexArabicCache.description: At his wedding ceremony Hossam, is killed by a stray bullet, his father Mukhtar recalls the palm reader who told him that he will have three children, but they will all die at their weddings.

plexArabicCache.name: Passion and Revenge
plexArabicCache.description: An Egyptian guy tried to love a women who taken care by his enemy

plexArabicCache.name: Paying the Price
plexArabicCache.description: Imad Bemirfat wonders in silence that he is below the level of her social family. He travels abroad to get his doctorate and when he comes back surprised by his agreement with his brother Ala to marry despite the opposition of her brother Nashat, he tries to convince Nadia to get rid of the fetus. .

plexArabicCache.name: People's secrets
plexArabicCache.description: After serving his prison sentence, Mansour is released but tries to seduce the wife of the man who helped him to get released, so he plans to get rid of him. But when Arafa's lost daughter returns, Mansour finds himself drawn to her.

plexArabicCache.name: Pity My Tears
plexArabicCache.description: When Amal's father falls on hard times, he sells his land to his neighbor, Mamdouh, who falls in love with Amal. But Amal is in a relationship with Mourad who starts avoiding her after he learns of her father's crisis, prompting Mamdouh to confess his love for Amal and ask for her hand in marriage.

plexArabicCache.name: Pledge of Love
plexArabicCache.description: Waheed returns from Europe after receiving a college degree. He requests permission from his father to travel to Cairo so that he could begin work at a company there. While in Cairo Waheed meets a beauty by the name of Nadia who herself appears to be in love with an old man who works at a piano sales and repair shop.

plexArabicCache.name: Precausion is Mandatory
plexArabicCache.description: Hassan Musharraf in one of the corrections, meets with different models of inmates within the correctional facility, and with time he gains the friendship of the inmates whose behavior improves and an atmosphere of friendship arises among everyone.

plexArabicCache.name: Predator
plexArabicCache.description: A team of commandos on a mission in a Central American jungle find themselves hunted by an extraterrestrial warrior.

plexArabicCache.name: Prisoner of the Night
plexArabicCache.description: Al-Gharib is a dangerous criminal who only strikes at night. As the police fail to catch him, Al-Gharib befriends a wealthy college student who gets to see a side to the terrifying serial killer that no one else gets to see.

plexArabicCache.name: The Professionals
plexArabicCache.description: Kazim forms a gang to smuggle antiquities. The gang tries to seize a land but the owner refuses to sell her land. She goes to hospital and is forced to sign a contract. Her son Ahmed returns from abroad to discover the gang's plan.

plexArabicCache.name: Public Notice
plexArabicCache.description: Aida works at Jalal Wahdan's investment company. Jalal asks her to help him return the savings of the depositors he has defrauded, from a bank in Switzerland that deals with voice prints. She tells Sami, her friend Rawya's husband, about this. Sami undergoes surgery to change his vocal cords, making his voice match Jalal's.

plexArabicCache.name: Pyaar Impossible!
plexArabicCache.description: Alisha (Priyanka Chopra) is the most beautiful girl in Ankert University. Abhay(Uday Chopra), a nerdy geek of the college loves her too. But she doesn't know he exists. Years later their paths cross and Abhay is reduced to playing nanny to Alisha's daughter. It's his only chance to realize his dream, he must win over her kid, he must be the man she always wanted, but didn't know it was him.

plexArabicCache.name: Qattr El-Nada
plexArabicCache.description: The unknown artist Wahid (Anwar Wagdi) married his colleague the unknown artist Drop of Dew (Shadia) and they set out to create work for themselves that was worthy of their talents. Time passed and this was not achieved. Wahid decided to play a trick to make himself into a famous person; he claimed he had killed his wife. His trick succeeded and he acquired great fame. A lady's body was found; the police thought it was his wife's body and that he was really the murderer. Wahid said his wife had not been killed and that she was alive somewhere. His wife had been in an automobile accident which caused memory loss. Wahid was sentenced to death. The lawyer tried to restore the wife's memory quickly to save Wahid from the death penalty; he succeeded in doing this at the last moment and Wahid was accordingly released. His fame began with that; then there was a quick change in his theater contracts and the trick enabled him to achieve the kind of renown he had never imagined.

plexArabicCache.name: Ragol lehaza alzaman
plexArabicCache.description: Debes, who works in a large gang in a drug case, is arrested and threatens to reveal the secrets of the gang. The senior lawyer, Naji, defends him against Judge Kamal, who is known for his extreme firmness.

plexArabicCache.name: Raqsat Al Wadah
plexArabicCache.description: A maid falls in love and bears her wealthy master's child, so the family marries her to a criminal to cover the scandal. Years later, her daughter (Samia), now a dancer, falls for a rich man (Magdy) who uncovers her true parentage.

plexArabicCache.name: Rassif Nemra 5
plexArabicCache.description: Sergeant Khamis, who works in the Coast Guard, succeeds in aborting a drug smuggling operation, so the smuggling gang tries to buy his integrity in order to make things easier for them, but he in turn refuses, so they resort to a plan to kill him in order to remove him from their path, but they fail and they kill his wife by mistake, and events escalate.

plexArabicCache.name: Rawaat El Hob
plexArabicCache.description: A young girl marries a book author who she admires because of his works, but she soon finds her husband's actions contrary to what he pronounces in his works, so she decides to leave.

plexArabicCache.name: Rebellious woman
plexArabicCache.description: Safaa works in Samir's company despite her husband Saber's objection. Samir asks her to travel to Jordan on a business trip, but Saber refuses and threatens to divorce her if she travels. However, she chooses to travel, as she is looking forward to getting rich. Samir's true nature becomes clear to her: he is a drug smuggler who exploits her in smuggling operations and tries to push her into a frivolous life.

plexArabicCache.name: Reda Bond
plexArabicCache.description: A gang looks for Napoleon's treasure and many conflicts arise among its members. When Azama finds the map leading to the treasure, he keeps it at his safe. Following Tanashy's murder, his furniture is sold in an auction where Reda buys it and gets into unimaginable troubles.

plexArabicCache.name: The Regret
plexArabicCache.description: Yasmin works in a factory and harbors a silent love for the engineer Raouf. As she starts works as a maid for the wealthy old man Al-Damanhouri, and she pretends to be Al-Damanhouri's daughter.

plexArabicCache.name: Repentance
plexArabicCache.description: Mashalla and Asghar are old friends. Mashalla falls in love with his tenant, Zari. Zari has a past that wants to hide it, but it causes a serious misunderstanding.

plexArabicCache.name: Rescue This Family
plexArabicCache.description: Layla, daughter of the wealthy Fouad, falls for womanizer Mamdouh. When her father refuses his proposal, she seeks revenge by sending anonymous letters to turn the family against each other. But will her plan work?

plexArabicCache.name: Revealing the Hidden
plexArabicCache.description: Salwa Shahin (Nabila Ebeid) was a former agent with secret state organization getting involved with politicians from other countries in sexual affairs to extract information from them and give it to the organization she worked for.

plexArabicCache.name: The River of Love
plexArabicCache.description: Nahr el Hub is the Egyptian adaptation of Leo Tolstoy's "Anna Karenina". Nawal, a rural girl, is married off to a wealthy aristocrat called Taher Basha (Zaki Rostom). Nawal gets increasingly depressed due to her husband's cold, cruel demeanor, despite their lavish life. Things take a turn (for both better and worse) when she meets Khaled (Omar Sharif), a handsome young army officer.

plexArabicCache.name: Road Without End
plexArabicCache.description: A hustler hanging around in a luxury hotel steals a bag full of stolen jewelery from a gang, he leave the city but the gang are after him, on the road he finds a small motel where he hides the bag and work for the old guy who own the hotel and sleeps with his young wife, she tries to convince him to get rid of the old man but he falls in love with the old man's young and innocent daughter.

plexArabicCache.name: Rurouni Kenshin Part I: Origins
plexArabicCache.description: A former assassin who has resolved to never kill again has his vow sorely tested.

plexArabicCache.name: Sa'aoud Bila Domouo
plexArabicCache.description: Mahmoud son of Jaber abandons the owner of one of the factories for Hind daughter of Juma the chief worker in the factory, after he promised her to marry, Juma is injured work injury, and loses his arm and work, Jaber refuses to compensate him, and orders his son Mahmoud to stay away from Hind, and when Juma tries to claim his right and the right of his fellow workers, Jaber manages a crime to get rid of him.

plexArabicCache.name: Saber Google
plexArabicCache.description: Saber Ali El Tamany(Mohamed Ragab) witty man in dealing with technology and communications, so everybody called him (Saber Google), and his proficiency enter him in a world full of suspicious and illegal transactions with the business, and he escaped to a European country after one of those conflicts but it does not end at this point.

plexArabicCache.name: Sayedat el kasr
plexArabicCache.description: A chance meeting at an auction brings together Sawsan (Faten Hamama), a working class girl and Adel (Omar Sharif), heir to a vast fortune with several estates to his name. This leads to a whirlwind marriage. This development spells trouble for Adel's fair-weather bourgeois clique, who are used to manipulating him with their own financial interests at heart.

plexArabicCache.name: Scandal in Zamalek
plexArabicCache.description: A man and sister of his wife under suspicion in that their commited a murder ; They do not know that the wife is involved in this accident .

plexArabicCache.name: The Scorpion
plexArabicCache.description: The businessman Tarek is married to Nahed but they don't have children. The couple adopts Heba from a shelter and transforms her life. When Tarek cheats on Nahed with his friend's wife, Nahed asks for divorce on the advice of the painter Maher.

plexArabicCache.name: The Second Wife
plexArabicCache.description: A corrupt mayor, who rules the village's people with power and injustice, forces another poor man's wife secretly to marry him in order to have a child.

plexArabicCache.name: The Secret Agent
plexArabicCache.description: Brazil, 1977. Marcelo, a technology expert in his early 40s, is on the run. Hoping to reunite with his son, he travels to Recife during Carnival but soon realizes that the city is not the safe haven he was expecting.

plexArabicCache.name: The Secret Police
plexArabicCache.description: While they were on their way to the mental hospital, a criminal escapes because of the negligence of the police officer.  Afraid of being punished, the police officer decides to make his uncle enter the hospital instead of the criminal.

plexArabicCache.name: Serr el ghaeb
plexArabicCache.description: A wealthy merchant monopolized the grain trade and used to hide it from time to time in order to manipulate its prices in the market, in this way it is a great wealth, suddenly the merchant disappears and leaves his wife who fails to know the secret of his sudden disappearance. She works for an accountant young man, who quickly falls in love with her, and at the same time helps her manage the department store.

plexArabicCache.name: The Seventh Sense
plexArabicCache.description: A young gym teacher tries to commit suicide after a series of failures through his life, only to meet a voodoo man who gives him the power to read minds.

plexArabicCache.name: Shafiqa Al-Qibtiya
plexArabicCache.description: The life of a well-known nineteenth-century belly dancer.

plexArabicCache.name: Shaqa Mafrousha
plexArabicCache.description: Zainab moves from Mansoura to Cairo to work as a music teacher, but she faces a problem finding accommodation. She eventually finds accommodation with the dancer (Najaf), but she hides from her that there is a resident during the day, so she sleeps there at night, and the reporter works at night and sleeps in the apartment during the day. The reporter discovers Zainab's residence in the apartment, and troubles begin.

plexArabicCache.name: Shari al-bahlawan
plexArabicCache.description: Pretty woman suffer from jealousy of her husband .

plexArabicCache.name: Shooter
plexArabicCache.description: An expert marksman is framed for the assassination of the US President.

plexArabicCache.name: Shore of Love
plexArabicCache.description: When rich young Adel falls in love with penniless Laila, others try to come between them.

plexArabicCache.name: The Showgirl
plexArabicCache.description: A group of stage actors who hate Ahmed Aluwi, the rich young man, starts attacking him in the magazines; when Ahemd knows about that, he decides to check the situation himself and he falls in love with one the actress over there; he pretends to be a poor simple actor, just to be near her; she starts responding to him without knowing his true identity.

plexArabicCache.name: Silence!
plexArabicCache.description: Homos and Halawa, street performers, get discovered by Safsaf, who records their song. Famous singer Ghandour steals their tune, changes the lyrics, and reworks it. They decide to fight for their rights.

plexArabicCache.name: The Sin
plexArabicCache.description: A poor peasant is raped by a guard when she goes out in the field to gather vegetables but does not confides in her husband about it. Later, she hides her pregnancy and plans to kill the baby as soon it is born.

plexArabicCache.name: The Single Husband
plexArabicCache.description: The events revolve around the teacher Ashour, a married man, who marries for the tenth time to the widow flowers, which angers his wives, so they refrain from living with him, discovers that the official who decides to marry is nothing but the daughter of his first wife, Nafisa, to turn the events upside down.

plexArabicCache.name: The Sinners
plexArabicCache.description: A murder occurs claiming the life of actress Sanaa Kamel. The investigation extends to everyone connected to her including her fiancé, who first reported the crime and eventually uncovers her complex ties to prominent and powerful figures.

plexArabicCache.name: Sleepless
plexArabicCache.description: Teenage Nadia is raised by her father after her mother's death. Returning home from boarding school, her father has re-married. Jealous Nadia decides to get rid of the competition of a stepmother by accusing her of sleeping with her uncle.

plexArabicCache.name: Soft Hands
plexArabicCache.description: A rich man who have two daughters one of his daughters married to poor man and he didn't approve that marriage then he broke and stay without any money so his daughter and her husband helped him through his friend when he find out he refused and decided to start working

plexArabicCache.name: Solomon's Ring
plexArabicCache.description: Musical from the Egyptian Golden Age of cinema.

plexArabicCache.name: Something in my Chest
plexArabicCache.description: Hussein Shaker is a man with dictatorial power, he tries to put one of his colleagues under control but he couldn't because of the man patriotism but then he dies and Hussein tries to destroy the man's whole family.

plexArabicCache.name: Son of the Nile
plexArabicCache.description: A young man from outskirt rebels against his life and abandons his woman to go to Cairo.

plexArabicCache.name: Sons of the Devil
plexArabicCache.description: Selim Abu Taqiyya, a drug kingpin who resides in Turkey, enlists his brother Mamdouh in drug trafficking operations until he eventually gets arrested. Selim disguises himself as a monk to visit his brother in prison, and police officer Ahmed disguises himself as a criminal to trap Selim's gang.

plexArabicCache.name: Spicy Falafel
plexArabicCache.description: Mustafa Al-Khashab is an influential businessman with a huge fortune, he's overprotective of his pampered daughter Ghada from anyone who might be after his wealth. She falls in love with Mahmoud, a struggling middle-class university student, and marries him despite her father's objection.

plexArabicCache.name: Story of a Lifetime
plexArabicCache.description: Musician Farid lives a careless life, actress Laila loves him but he does not feel it, while those around him try to bring him closer to Laila, Nadia the daughter of his friend , who died comes to live in his house. Farid falls in love with her, while she falls in love with his younger brother Mamdouh

plexArabicCache.name: The Straight Road
plexArabicCache.description: Youssef, a devoted family man, is led astray by Thurayya, a deceitful singer. He is pressured to steal a big sum of money and run away to Beirut and he is presumed dead in a car accident. He returns later to Egypt after he lost everything.

plexArabicCache.name: The Stranger
plexArabicCache.description: In a small village in the occupied Golan Heights, the life of a desperate unlicensed doctor, who is going through an existential crisis, takes another unlucky turn when he encounters a man wounded in the war in Syria. Overturning all community expectations in times of war and national crisis, he ventures forth to meet his newly found destiny.

plexArabicCache.name: Sultan
plexArabicCache.description: A small-town wrestler chases Olympic glory, falls for a fierce female champion, builds a life around her dreams as much as his own, then watches it collapse; years later, he fights his way back from ruin.

plexArabicCache.name: The Sun Will Never Set
plexArabicCache.description: An aristocratic family is torn down after the death of its patriarch. He leaves alone his widow wife and five of his daughters and sons. His eldest son, Ahmed (Shukry Sarhan), takes the role of the man in the house and helps his mother take care of his brother and sisters. Mamdouh (Ahmed Ramzy), his brother, is a self-centered man who refuses to follow his brother’s step and decides to make his own decisions in his life.

plexArabicCache.name: Sunset and Sunrise
plexArabicCache.description: In the wake of the Cairo Fire, Essam feels guilty for betraying his friend Samir by messing around with his wife Madiha. Essam decides to take revenge on Madiha's father who pressured him to marry her to avoid a scandal.

plexArabicCache.name: Sweet and Naughty
plexArabicCache.description: A film producer who agrees with one of the directors to direct a movie, assigning the movie starring to Noussa, then filming is delayed and disputes arise between Noussa and the film's hero, as they both try to manage a mold for the other, so that they fall in love together and insist on completing filming after changing the story of the movie.

plexArabicCache.name: Tahera
plexArabicCache.description: (Tahira) is a pious girl. A dangerous thief comes to her room. He had robbed a jewelry store in the neighborhood. Then the police chased him, so he took refuge in her room. (Tahira) pities him and seeks to guide him to the path of goodness. He manages to escape, but the police find the stolen items in her room. He is arrested. The police believed that she was a conspirator with him in stealing the gold jewelry.

plexArabicCache.name: El talata yuhebbunaha
plexArabicCache.description: The film tells about the girl, Iman, who deals with people in her free nature, so she watches as often as she wants and goes out with the youth for walks whenever she wants, and her friend alerts her to release her.

plexArabicCache.name: The Tale of Three Girls
