plexArabicCache.description: Three women each have their own ambitions. The first dreams of fame and fortune and meets a rich married man. The second is a secretary and have a crush on her martied boss. Having learned from them, the third takes a different path.

plexArabicCache.name: Tarek Al Amal
plexArabicCache.description: Saniya, a poor girl living with her seamstress mother, delivers a dress to Madame Sottouhi who secretly runs a brothel. One of the brothel's clients takes interest in Saniya and offers her work, but she refuses. Then her mother falls ill.

plexArabicCache.name: Tattah
plexArabicCache.description: This satirical comedy revolves around Tatah, a maladjusted, poor man from Abdeen who befriends a woman online with help from his nephew. Just as his life starts to change, the woman is kidnapped and he sets out to save her.

plexArabicCache.name: Tears Without Sins
plexArabicCache.description: The story of a woman married to a poor doctor who  don't have children. He secretly marries and has a son while she goes to Greece and meets a painter and thinks he  raped her while drunk.  She returns back pregnant, but it turns out that she's pregnant with her husband and not the painter.

plexArabicCache.name: Teenagers
plexArabicCache.description: Nada meets the pilot officer Adel at a party with her liberal colleague Safaa, and goes out with him in the plane he is piloting. She is absent from school, which causes her problems as the headmistress informs the mother of her daughter’s absence. Adel proposes to her, but her family refuses her marriage to the officer and forces her to get engaged to... Her cousin after insulting and beating her.

plexArabicCache.name: They Stole Umm Ali
plexArabicCache.description: Simon and Sally are members of an international mafia. After they steal a rare jewel ,they travel to Luxor on a cruise ship. Police officers Shaaban and Essam are sent behind them, and ride the same ship. Then Sally falls in love with officer Shaban, who plays along to find out where the jewel is.

plexArabicCache.name: They Taught Me Love
plexArabicCache.description: Sami comes from the countryside to Cairo to join a girls' school. There, he admires his student Nawal, but he is ashamed to be honest with her about his feelings for her. At the same time, Mamdouh tries to make Nawal love him, whom he meets by chance, so he turns to his friend Sami to help him write a book. Love letters, creating a love triangle.

plexArabicCache.name: They're Driving Me Crazy
plexArabicCache.description: Ismail sends his sick son and wife to Alexandria and continues his work with the movie star Sawsan as a hairdresser. As Sawsan reports her lover Abbas to the police after a dispute with him, Ismail comes to her house and discovers her body.

plexArabicCache.name: The Thief and the Dogs
plexArabicCache.description: This film, inspired by Naguib Mahfouz' The thief and the dogs, tells the story of Mahran, a thief who quickly ascends to be the head of his gang. However, his second in command conspires against Mahran to take his position and his wife. After his prison term, Mahran is thirsty for revenge. But being chased by the police and by his new enemies destines him to a tragic life in hiding.

plexArabicCache.name: The Thin Thread
plexArabicCache.description: (Mona) A poor girl who works as a simple employee at a bank and provides her family. Under the pressure of need and illness of her father and the pressure of her mother, which insists on her to increase her income, she gets a wealthy old businessman to love her. An engineer (Adel), who works in the company of her lover (Abdo) reveals his love, she convinces him to resign and build his own independent company and give him jewelry as a capital and stand by him and encourage him and cut ties with (Abdo). Will their love story continue?

plexArabicCache.name: This is Love
plexArabicCache.description: Hussein is a conservative engineer who finds a perfect wife in Sherifa whom he thinks has never been in love. Ten days into their marriage, he learns that she had a past affair, and he merely regards her as a fallen woman.

plexArabicCache.name: This Was My Father's Crime
plexArabicCache.description: A big lawyer is involved with a girl demanding marriage, but he refuses where his social status does not allow him to be associated with her, and the girl puts her child and calls her Samiha and then she leaves life before the girl grows up to disclose her father, Samiha grows up and works in a worker, and the lawyer grows until he becomes a famous lawyer. Samiha gets to know Samir Bey, who assgresses her and escapes from her to the Levant, but Samiha insists on resorting to the judiciary, and Samir's father assigns the famous lawyer to defend his son.

plexArabicCache.name: Those Gentlemen
plexArabicCache.description: Fawzya suffers from the treatment of her husband Ahmed who doesn't pay her enough attention. After Ahmed refuses to divorce Fawzya, she decides to have a sex change surgery and becomes a man. Fawzya suffers a lot after changing her sex and their child loses his mother's tenderness.

plexArabicCache.name: Three Thieves
plexArabicCache.description: Three stories by Ihsan Abdel Quddous about three thieves - each driven by different motives: one steals from a cheating wife, another hijacks a bus to reach his sick wife, and the third robs his elderly aunt to get married.

plexArabicCache.name: The Three Troublemakers
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmed attends college while his friend Ramzi inherits a great legacy after the death of his father and sows his money because of his mother's pampering, while the third friend Fathi lives with his mother after her divorce from his father, the great lawyer, and the three friends spend all their time in fun and fun. Ramzi hits a man with his car while he and his friends are drunk. Ahmed takes advantage of this incident by extorting money from Ramzi. Ahmed and Fathi get to know this girl who is overburdened by her demands, events escalate and the three friends decide to go their extravagant distance.

plexArabicCache.name: The Three Wise Men
plexArabicCache.description: Amin, a merchant, is haunted by nightmares of a young man attempting to kill him. When the man appears in real life seeking work, Amin learns he loves his daughter, Samia, and wants to marry her. Terrified, Amin opposes their relationship.

plexArabicCache.name: Thug In High School
plexArabicCache.description: A thug kills female students from the girls' school, and it happens that one of the teachers of this school is completely similar to that thug, so the police arrest him, thinking that he’s the thug.

plexArabicCache.name: Till We Meet
plexArabicCache.description: As a young actress falls in love with a famous writer, she finds herself facing a dilemma when he proposes to her and she is torn between her feelings for him and her guilt over the fact that he is married with a daughter.

plexArabicCache.name: The Time Machine
plexArabicCache.description: Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds humankind divided into two warring races.

plexArabicCache.name: Torment
plexArabicCache.description: Paul, an irritable and stressed-out hotel manager, begins to gradually develop paranoid delusions about his wife's infidelity. As he succumbs to green-eyed jealousy, his life starts to crumble. Each step on his downward spiral to madness seems to accelerate, driving him further along the path to a personal hell. Finally, the former shell of his personality cracks completely, with tragic consequences.

plexArabicCache.name: Torment is a Woman
plexArabicCache.description: Inass married Dr. Galal out of love and gave birth to their child Hisham, but she is also jealous of her husband's success, and feels suspicious of her husband and his colleague Laila, she decides to make his life hell, questioning his paternity for their son Hisham, Galal Collapses as a result of his wife's delirium, suffers a nervous shock that pushes him towards the abyss.

plexArabicCache.name: Tough Road
plexArabicCache.description: During a chase of drug deal, officer magdy lost his way in the desert , got saved by Saba. He finds out that saba's family is drug lord and they also identify  him so they decided to kill him but by the help of saba, they escaped.

plexArabicCache.name: The Train
plexArabicCache.description: A train driver kills his wife for cheating on him with his assistant whom he tries to kill as well. They get into a fight and fall from the train, leaving the panicked passengers heading to a disaster.

plexArabicCache.name: Travel Route
plexArabicCache.description: Zaghloul returns to his hometown after five years of absence during which he worked in one of the Arab countries and created a big wealth to marry his cousin, which evokes the envy of Sheikh Tawfiq, who plans to seize his wealth

plexArabicCache.name: Troublemaker
plexArabicCache.description: (Azza) leaves her home due to problems with her stepfather and gets to know (Medhat) who wants her but she doesn't. Suddenly she found herself has to pretend to be a widow with a child and she has to take care of him with (Medhat).

plexArabicCache.name: Unfaithful
plexArabicCache.description: Ilham's (Nadia Lutfi) marriage to a highly successful - and often busy - lawyer (Mahmoud Mursi) is put to the test, and suspicions of infidelity arise.

plexArabicCache.name: Vengeance
plexArabicCache.description: The brutal murder of the wife of “Toro,” a military hero in the special forces, turns him into a man with a single purpose: revenge. After a stroke of fate makes him a millionaire, Carlos transforms his fortune into an arsenal and, together with his closest soldiers, sets out to hunt down those responsible.

plexArabicCache.name: Very Important Man
plexArabicCache.description: Shafi'i is a 40 year old man ,living with his mother.  He lives in a closed circle from work to the house.  He gets in a car accident and escapes, thinking that he killed a policeman and then he hides in a dancer's house who changes his view of life and then begins the adventure of  his life.

plexArabicCache.name: The Victims
plexArabicCache.description: A juvenile reform prison hires a psychologist, Dr. Essmat, to help in the reformation and rehabilitation of the girls in the prison. As he studies their cases and tries to find solutions for their problems, the compassionate Dr. Essmat is confronted with the numerous problems that led the girls to be imprisoned. When one of the girls claims that he raped her he finds himself in trouble with the prison administration, but when she reveals the truth the girls take a different view towards Dr. Essmat and try to help him achieve his goals in reforming them. Written by Feisal Nada and starring Nour El-Sherif.

plexArabicCache.name: Vote for Dr. Sulaiman Abdulbaset
plexArabicCache.description: Dr. Seliman, a law professor, feels neglected by his wife Aliyyah and gets involved with a lady of the night, Ibtisam. During a visit to her place, her lover Tawfiq shows up and Seliman kills him in self-defense. Things escalate from there

plexArabicCache.name: Wa la yazal al tahqiq mostameran
plexArabicCache.description: Dreaming of wealth and posh life made a teacher's wife start an affair with his friend to escape the average life,but Brought jealousy,conspiracy and plots that ended with crimes

plexArabicCache.name: Wantaha Al-Hob
plexArabicCache.description: (Ahmed) is associated with (Suad), and on the wedding night, Souad is injured by a stray bullet that leads to her death, and the wedding turns into a dead, and Ahmed is severely depressed, Saad's father is saddened by the death of his eldest daughter, so Ahmed recommends his young daughter (Zizi) before his death, and asks him to marry her, but he refuses, and lives on the memory of his beloved Suad, while raising her little sister Zizi, and then with his feelings are consolidated towards her, who closely resembles her late sister. A struggle begins within him between nostalgia for his lover and sister.

plexArabicCache.name: La waqt lil-demoue
plexArabicCache.description: A dancer and officer meets and fall in love, but duty's call separated them. After hearing news of his death, azza gets involved in the night life and dancing in cabarets to make a living and cope with her sorrow, but her shock was great when she sees her fiance alive and well again, but how she'll confront him with her regretful past and build a life with him?

plexArabicCache.name: The Warm Embrace
plexArabicCache.description: Madiha is an air hostess ,who failed twice in marriage and prefers to live alone with the same freedom as men. She meets Soliman and he misbehaves with her, but she teaches him an unforgettablele lesson. Fate sends her Hassan who wants to marry her but family ,society and tradition stand in the way.

plexArabicCache.name: The Way Of The Devil
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmed and his friend Hassan Abu Douma get to know a third-class dancer named Samia who hates her profession because she is an honest person and until she gets rid of her life as a dancer, she agreed to live with Ahmed and Hassan.

plexArabicCache.name: Wedad, The Belly Dancer
plexArabicCache.description: (Wedad) is a dancer in her aunt's cafe in Naja Hammadi, and once the prince (Yusuf), known for his corruption and injustice, arrives at his palace in Naja Hammadi, and sees Widad and asks her to dance for him at a private party, and tries to rape her but she succeeds in running away from him, and she tries to take revenge with the help of officer (Hassan).

plexArabicCache.name: The Wedding Night
plexArabicCache.description: A woman tries to divorce her husband, by plotting with him to make him unlikable to her mother, who set them up in the first place, so she could be with the man she fell in love with in her summer vacation.

plexArabicCache.name: Who is the Thief Between Us
plexArabicCache.description: Sherif returns from London with his girlfriend Sahar, he learns from her father that his identical twin brother Hassan is in prison for embezzling money from the company. Sherif visits Hassan who tells him that the money is hidden inside a bed and must find it as soon as possible.

plexArabicCache.name: Who's Done it ?
plexArabicCache.description: Before his death, Mansour Pasha writes over his wealth to his two sons Omar and Othman; as the latter drowns, his wife gets a boy and claims he is Othman's son to ensure her share in the inheritance. When the boy grows older, he befriends Rashad, Omar's son, and gates of hell and vengeance open.

plexArabicCache.name: Whom Should We Shoot?
plexArabicCache.description: Mustafa shoots the boss of a governmental company ; The crime is investigated to find out the reasons .

plexArabicCache.name: Why, O Violet?
plexArabicCache.description: A portrayal of the lives of four friends who have different dreams and aspirations; Ahmed falls in love with a girl he saw once, Sayed gets in trouble when he sells the laboratory animals, Abbas who is married to a woman that doesn't love him, and Ali who works in illegal operations.

plexArabicCache.name: The Will
plexArabicCache.description: The story of a young man from a lower-class family who falls in love with a wealthy girl. Despite the class difference and the obstacles they face, their love endures, and they must navigate the challenges posed by their families' social disparity and the economic hardships of the time.

plexArabicCache.name: Wives killing association
plexArabicCache.description: A husband and his wife suffer from permanent disputes between them, and the husband notices that all his acquaintances suffer from the same problem with their wives, so he decides to establish a secret society to kill wives, while the wife owns the building in which they live and insists on evicting the residents of the roof, due to their delay in paying the rent, while a love story arises between one of them and the daughter of the building owner.

plexArabicCache.name: Woledt min Gadeed
plexArabicCache.description: The events begin when a famous singer suffers a crisis when he loses the ability to sing, due to a plot by his beloved Nadia, whom he betrayed. He feels extremely desperate, and at the same time there is a deranged person chasing him. Nadia withdraws herself and tries to help her lover again. Will she succeed?

plexArabicCache.name: A Woman for Love
plexArabicCache.description: Mahmoud takes over the education of Suad after the death of her parents, and years pass and he marries her, but divorces her after he suffers sexual dysfunction as a result of an accident. She gets to know Ahmed and the tension rises.

plexArabicCache.name: A Woman in a Spiral
plexArabicCache.description: The story revolves around a combat nurse, her daughter's fiancé Nadia dies in an accident, and then she discovers that her daughter is pregnant, and when Nadia gives birth to her child Fathiya, the mother replaces her with a dead child.

plexArabicCache.name: A Woman With a Bad Reputation
plexArabicCache.description: A young man asks his wife to dance with his boss at a party. The woman gets into an affair with the boss and commits infidelity. Her marriage dissolves and her life worsens. Her son has an illness, so the wife is forced to accept gifts from the boss.

plexArabicCache.name: A Woman, Unfortunately
plexArabicCache.description: The film revolves around two orphaned twin sisters, Nadia and Heba (Yousra), each of whom is different from the other; Heba is sensible, balanced and polite, while Nadia is liberated and impulsive and only cares about how to become rich by any means. While Heba admires her university professor (Karam Mattawa), Nadia meets Khaled (Sami El Adl) in the elevator and discovers that he works for the company she is applying to work for, which is headed by (Salah Zulfikar). Each of them tries to achieve her goal and reach it.

plexArabicCache.name: women in print
plexArabicCache.description: When one of the gangsters leaves the airport, another gang attacks him and seizes the diamond bag. The gang tries to manufacture the diamonds, making a plan with the help of the jeweler, and his brother.

plexArabicCache.name: Women in the City
plexArabicCache.description: After a fire breaks out in a company warehouse to cover up a theft, Youssef grows suspicious and confides in his colleague Dalia. Then he contacts Baheera, a journalist, and provides her with documents to investigate the incident.

plexArabicCache.name: Women Talking
plexArabicCache.description: The women of an isolated religious community grapple with reconciling their reality with their faith. Though the backstory, we see a community of women come together to figure out how they might move forward together to build a better world for themselves and their children. Stay and fight or leave. They will not do nothing.

plexArabicCache.name: A World of Children
plexArabicCache.description: Widowed Helmy, a father of eight, falls in love with young widow Samia, who has six children of her own. After initially hiding the truth about their large families, they marry and work together to create a system for managing their new life under one roof.

plexArabicCache.name: Yasmine
plexArabicCache.description: The head of the family, Adel (Mohamamd al-Dib) did not want another daughter, so when Yasmin was born he left her at the door of a shelter. Adel later died; the girl grew up and ran away from the shelter to join a gang of pickpockets as Atuta. She happens to meet an unemployed trumpet player, Wahid (Anwar Wagdi) who asked her to help him with his act, stop stealing, and repent. She lives with him for a time but got tired of the respectable life and went back to the gang. Wahid discovers that Atuta was a rich man's daughter. When Atuta's gang robs her grandfather's [Zaki Rostom] villa, the gang is arrested; Atuta becomes Yasmin again and returns to her mother (Madiha Yousri), who marries Wahid.

plexArabicCache.name: You killed my father
plexArabicCache.description: Nabila returns to Egypt after a long period of living abroad in search of her father's killer. She meets Mazloum, who asks him to help her catch the culprit. The two are exposed to many pranks, especially after meeting the real culprits. Every time they reach the truth, another murder occurs, and Nabila and Mazloum continue searching for her father's killer.

plexArabicCache.name: Young men dancing over the fire
plexArabicCache.description: Father Hanafi raised his three sons to be at the crossroads to receive their next life, the great Alaa Mohandes is looking forward to work in commercial projects.The middle Adel is a university student living in a fun life and the daughter Mushira renewed daily through her interest in her study, and connects love between her and her colleague Salah.

plexArabicCache.name: Your luck this week
plexArabicCache.description: A rich son embezzles money from his father to pay a singer to perform at their casino. He loses it gambling and plans suicide but meets the singer and convinces her to work for his father after lying about hearing her on the radio.

plexArabicCache.name: إمرأة في دمي
plexArabicCache.description: Ahmed recognizes Laila and relates to her and at the same time agrees to marry Omar without knowing that Ahmad's brother knows Ahmed's wedding ceremony without knowing that he is Omar Fathor to have an accident in his car speed up Omar and does not attend the ceremony.
